nasb.text: You shall make its pails for removing its ashes, and its shovels and its basins and its forks and its firepans; you shall make all its utensils of bronze.

esv.text: You shall make pots for it to receive its ashes, and shovels and basins and forks and fire pans. You shall make all its utensils of bronze.

cnv.text: 要做盆，用來收去祭壇上的灰，又要做鏟、盤、肉叉和火鼎；祭壇上的一切器具，你都要用銅來做。

ccb.text: 用铜造盛坛灰的盆和其他祭坛用具，即铲、碗、肉叉、火鼎。
